requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Botswana energy programme)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/MEPS——家用制冷器具（博茨瓦纳能效计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/MEPS——家用製冷器具（波札那能效計畫）

summary.en: Botswana participates in regional energy-efficiency efforts (SADC / SACU appliance-efficiency programmes) and develops Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-labelling for major appliances including refrigerators, frequently adopting the IEC 62552 measurement basis and SANS/SADC-aligned label formats. Where a MEPS / energy-label requirement is in force for refrigerating appliances, units must meet the minimum energy performance threshold and carry the prescribed energy label (efficiency class and annual energy consumption in kWh/annum) before sale. Energy performance is measured to the IEC 62552 series. Manufacturers should confirm with BOBS / the responsible Botswana energy authority whether a mandatory MEPS and label for refrigerators is currently in force, the threshold values, and the label artwork required, because the programme scope and effective dates evolve.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳参与区域能效行动（SADC/SACU器具能效计划），并为包括电冰箱在内的主要器具制定最低能效性能标准（MEPS）及能效标识，常采用IEC 62552测量基准及SANS/SADC对齐的标签格式。若制冷器具的MEPS/能效标识要求已生效，器具在销售前须达到最低能效门槛并附贴规定的能效标签（能效等级及年耗电量，千瓦时/年）。能效性能依据IEC 62552系列测量。制造商应向BOBS/博茨瓦纳主管能源机构确认当前电冰箱的强制性MEPS及标签是否生效、门槛值及所需标签图样，因为该计划范围和生效日期会变化。
summary.zht: 波札那參與區域能效行動（SADC/SACU器具能效計畫），並為包括電冰箱在內的主要器具制定最低能效性能標準（MEPS）及能效標識，常採用IEC 62552測量基準及SANS/SADC對齊的標籤格式。若製冷器具的MEPS/能效標識要求已生效，器具在銷售前須達到最低能效門檻並附貼規定的能效標籤（能效等級及年耗電量，千瓦時/年）。能效性能依據IEC 62552系列測量。製造商應向BOBS/波札那主管能源機構確認當前電冰箱的強制性MEPS及標籤是否生效、門檻值及所需標籤圖樣，因為該計畫範圍和生效日期會變化。

standards_or_laws: Botswana / SADC appliance energy-efficiency programme — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy labelling for refrigerating appliances (where in force)
BOS / IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for energy performance)
Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) — responsible standards body; energy authority for label administration

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing energy grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum) and minimum annual energy consumption, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label (CEL) system administered with NDRC. Measurement aligns with the IEC 62552 series (GB/T 8059). The Chinese grade scale and the Botswana/SADC MEPS thresholds use different reference formulas and label formats; a Chinese Grade 1/2 rating does not automatically equal the Botswana MEPS pass or the Botswana label class without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低）及年耗电量最低限值，由SAMR在与NDRC共同管理的中国能效标识（CEL）制度下执行。测量与IEC 62552系列（GB/T 8059）对齐。中国等级体系与博茨瓦纳/SADC的MEPS门槛采用不同的参考公式和标签格式；中国1级/2级评定未经重新计算不自动等同于博茨瓦纳MEPS通过或博茨瓦纳标签等级。
summary.zht: 中國的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低）及年耗電量最低限值，由SAMR在與NDRC共同管理的中國能效標識（CEL）制度下執行。測量與IEC 62552系列（GB/T 8059）對齊。中國等級體系與波札那/SADC的MEPS門檻採用不同的參考公式和標籤格式；中國1級/2級評定未經重新計算不自動等同於波札那MEPS通過或波札那標籤等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test methods (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps where a Botswana MEPS / label applies: (1) Threshold recalculation — the Botswana/SADC MEPS reference formula and label class differ from China's GB 12021.2 grade scale, so the model's energy data must be assessed against the Botswana threshold (measured to IEC 62552, which China's GB/T 8059 already aligns with, so the measurement data is largely reusable — only the pass/label-class computation differs); (2) Label artwork — the Botswana/SADC energy label format (class + kWh/annum) must be applied; the Chinese CEL label cannot serve as the Botswana label. Because both regimes use the IEC 62552 measurement base, the test burden is light relative to a wholly different methodology; the main work is confirming the current Botswana MEPS threshold and producing the correct local label. Exporters must verify with BOBS / the Botswana energy authority whether the refrigerator MEPS/label is mandatory now and the exact in-force values.
gap.zh: 在博茨瓦纳MEPS/标签适用时存在两项差距：（1）门槛重新计算——博茨瓦纳/SADC的MEPS参考公式和标签等级不同于中国GB 12021.2等级体系，故须将型号能效数据对照博茨瓦纳门槛评估（依IEC 62552测量，中国GB/T 8059已与之对齐，故测量数据大体可复用——仅通过/标签等级计算不同）；（2）标签图样——须采用博茨瓦纳/SADC能效标签格式（等级+千瓦时/年）；中国CEL标签不能充当博茨瓦纳标签。由于两制度均采用IEC 62552测量基准，相对于全然不同的方法，检测负担较轻；主要工作是确认当前博茨瓦纳MEPS门槛并制作正确的本地标签。出口商须向BOBS/博茨瓦纳能源主管机构核实电冰箱MEPS/标签当前是否强制及确切生效数值。
gap.zht: 在波札那MEPS/標籤適用時存在兩項差距：（1）門檻重新計算——波札那/SADC的MEPS參考公式和標籤等級不同於中國GB 12021.2等級體系，故須將型號能效數據對照波札那門檻評估（依IEC 62552測量，中國GB/T 8059已與之對齊，故測量數據大體可複用——僅通過/標籤等級計算不同）；（2）標籤圖樣——須採用波札那/SADC能效標籤格式（等級+千瓦時/年）；中國CEL標籤不能充當波札那標籤。由於兩制度均採用IEC 62552測量基準，相對於全然不同的方法，檢測負擔較輕；主要工作是確認當前波札那MEPS門檻並製作正確的本地標籤。出口商須向BOBS/波札那能源主管機構核實電冰箱MEPS/標籤當前是否強制及確切生效數值。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / verify — mandatory where a Botswana (SADC-aligned) MEPS and energy label for refrigerating appliances is in force; threshold and label class must be met before sale. Confirm current scope and effective values with BOBS / the Botswana energy authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where a Botswana/SADC MEPS and energy label for refrigerators is in force, units must meet the local threshold and carry the local label. Because both Botswana and China measure to the IEC 62552 base, Chinese energy test data is largely reusable — only the pass/label-class computation and the label artwork differ. Confirm the current mandatory status and in-force threshold with BOBS / the Botswana energy authority before relying on existing data.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在博茨瓦纳/SADC电冰箱MEPS及能效标签生效之处，器具须达到本地门槛并附贴本地标签。由于博茨瓦纳与中国均以IEC 62552为测量基准，中国能效检测数据大体可复用——仅通过/标签等级计算及标签图样不同。在依赖现有数据前，请向BOBS/博茨瓦纳能源主管机构确认当前强制状态及生效门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在波札那/SADC電冰箱MEPS及能效標籤生效之處，器具須達到本地門檻並附貼本地標籤。由於波札那與中國均以IEC 62552為測量基準，中國能效檢測數據大體可複用——僅通過/標籤等級計算及標籤圖樣不同。在依賴現有數據前，請向BOBS/波札那能源主管機構確認當前強制狀態及生效門檻。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label Display & Local Marking — Point-of-Sale Requirements (Botswana)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签展示与本地标识——销售点要求（博茨瓦纳）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤展示與本地標識——銷售點要求（波札那）

summary.en: Where Botswana mandates an energy label for refrigerating appliances, the prescribed label (efficiency class plus annual energy consumption in kWh/annum, per the Botswana/SADC label format) must be displayed on the appliance at point of sale. Separately, BOBS rating-plate and marking expectations apply: the appliance must carry a legible, durable rating plate stating voltage (230 V), frequency (50 Hz), rated power/current, refrigerant type and charge, and model identifier, with safety and operating instructions supplied (English is the official/working language of Botswana). The responsible importer's details are typically required on the product or accompanying documentation under the import-inspection scheme. There is no EU-style EPREL pre-registration database obligation in Botswana — the label requirement is a physical/point-of-sale obligation rather than a central product-registry filing.
summary.zh: 在博茨瓦纳对制冷器具强制要求能效标签之处，规定的标签（能效等级加年耗电量，千瓦时/年，按博茨瓦纳/SADC标签格式）须在销售点展示于器具上。另须满足BOBS铭牌及标识要求：器具须附清晰耐久的铭牌，载明电压（230 V）、频率（50 Hz）、额定功率/电流、制冷剂类型及充注量、型号标识符，并提供安全及操作说明（英语为博茨瓦纳官方/工作语言）。进口检验制度下，通常要求在产品或随附文件上载明责任进口商信息。博茨瓦纳无欧盟式EPREL预注册数据库义务——标签要求是实体/销售点义务，而非中央产品注册申报。
summary.zht: 在波札那對製冷器具強制要求能效標籤之處，規定的標籤（能效等級加年耗電量，千瓦時/年，按波札那/SADC標籤格式）須在銷售點展示於器具上。另須滿足BOBS銘牌及標識要求：器具須附清晰耐久的銘牌，載明電壓（230 V）、頻率（50 Hz）、額定功率/電流、製冷劑類型及充注量、型號識別符，並提供安全及操作說明（英語為波札那官方/工作語言）。進口檢驗制度下，通常要求在產品或隨附文件上載明責任進口商資訊。波札那無歐盟式EPREL預登記數據庫義務——標籤要求是實體/銷售點義務，而非中央產品登記申報。

standards_or_laws: Botswana / SADC energy-label format — point-of-sale display of efficiency class and annual energy consumption (where in force)
BOBS rating-plate and marking requirements via BOS/IEC 60335-1 / 60335-2-24 (voltage, frequency, power, refrigerant type/charge, model identifier)
BOS import-inspection scheme — responsible importer details on product / accompanying documentation

summary.en: In China, the China Energy Label (CEL) — administered under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), based on GB 12021.2-2015 — is displayed on the appliance at point of sale, showing the 1-to-5 grade and annual energy consumption. Rating-plate and marking follow GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 with Chinese-language instructions and 220 V / 50 Hz rating. China self-declares the grade from GB 12021.2 testing and has no EPREL-style pre-registration database. The Chinese-language instructions, 220 V rating-plate, and CEL label all need localisation for Botswana (English, 230 V, Botswana/SADC label).
summary.zh: 在中国，中国能效标识（CEL）——依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版），基于GB 12021.2-2015——在销售点展示于器具上，标示1至5级及年耗电量。铭牌及标识遵循GB 4706.13/GB 4706.1，配中文说明书及220 V/50 Hz额定。中国依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级，无EPREL式预注册数据库。中文说明书、220 V铭牌及CEL标签均须为博茨瓦纳本地化（英语、230 V、博茨瓦纳/SADC标签）。
summary.zht: 在中國，中國能效標識（CEL）——依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版），基於GB 12021.2-2015——在銷售點展示於器具上，標示1至5級及年耗電量。銘牌及標識遵循GB 4706.13/GB 4706.1，配中文說明書及220 V/50 Hz額定。中國依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級，無EPREL式預登記數據庫。中文說明書、220 V銘牌及CEL標籤均須為波札那本地化（英語、230 V、波札那/SADC標籤）。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 — rating-plate and marking basis (Chinese-language instructions, 220 V rating)

gap.en: Localisation gaps for Botswana: (1) Label swap — the Chinese CEL (1-to-5 grade) cannot be used; where a Botswana label is mandated, the Botswana/SADC-format label (class + kWh/annum) must be produced and displayed; (2) Rating-plate voltage — the rating plate and any printed voltage/marking must reflect 230 V 50 Hz, not China's 220 V; (3) Language — operating and safety instructions must be in English; (4) Importer identification — the responsible Botswana importer's details should appear on the product or documentation for the import-inspection scheme. Unlike the EU, there is NO central pre-registration database (no EPREL equivalent) to file before shipment — the obligation is physical labelling/marking and import-inspection clearance. Confirm whether the refrigerator energy label is currently mandatory and the exact label format with BOBS / the Botswana energy authority.
gap.zh: 博茨瓦纳本地化差距：（1）标签替换——不能使用中国CEL（1至5级）；在博茨瓦纳强制要求标签之处，须制作并展示博茨瓦纳/SADC格式标签（等级+千瓦时/年）；（2）铭牌电压——铭牌及任何印制电压/标识须反映230 V 50 Hz，而非中国220 V；（3）语言——操作及安全说明须为英语；（4）进口商标识——进口检验制度下，责任进口商信息应出现在产品或文件上。与欧盟不同，发货前无中央预注册数据库（无EPREL对应）须申报——义务为实体标签/标识及进口检验放行。请向BOBS/博茨瓦纳能源主管机构确认电冰箱能效标签当前是否强制及确切标签格式。
gap.zht: 波札那本地化差距：（1）標籤替換——不能使用中國CEL（1至5級）；在波札那強制要求標籤之處，須製作並展示波札那/SADC格式標籤（等級+千瓦時/年）；（2）銘牌電壓——銘牌及任何印製電壓/標識須反映230 V 50 Hz，而非中國220 V；（3）語言——操作及安全說明須為英語；（4）進口商標識——進口檢驗制度下，責任進口商資訊應出現在產品或文件上。與歐盟不同，發貨前無中央預登記數據庫（無EPREL對應）須申報——義務為實體標籤/標識及進口檢驗放行。請向BOBS/波札那能源主管機構確認電冰箱能效標籤當前是否強制及確切標籤格式。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / verify — energy-label display mandatory where a Botswana refrigerator energy label is in force; rating-plate, 230 V marking, English instructions, and importer identification apply under BOBS / the import-inspection scheme. No EPREL-style pre-registration database
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale; rating-plate/marking and Chinese-language instructions per GB standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Botswana, the Chinese CEL label and 220 V Chinese marking must be localised: a Botswana/SADC energy label (where mandated), a 230 V 50 Hz rating plate, English instructions, and importer identification. There is no EPREL-style pre-registration to file — the obligation is physical labelling/marking and import-inspection clearance. Confirm the current label mandate and format with BOBS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对博茨瓦纳而言，中国CEL标签及220 V中国标识须本地化：博茨瓦纳/SADC能效标签（在强制要求之处）、230 V 50 Hz铭牌、英语说明书及进口商标识。无EPREL式预注册须申报——义务为实体标签/标识及进口检验放行。请向BOBS确认当前标签强制要求及格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對波札那而言，中國CEL標籤及220 V中國標識須本地化：波札那/SADC能效標籤（在強制要求之處）、230 V 50 Hz銘牌、英語說明書及進口商標識。無EPREL式預登記須申報——義務為實體標籤/標識及進口檢驗放行。請向BOBS確認當前標籤強制要求及格式。
